request.instructions: string (user's refinement instructions, e.g. 'the hook is weak, make it more confrontational')

description: Refines the script by regenerating the weakest pass with user instructions injected as additional context. Returns immediately; progress communicated via Supabase Realtime.

async_steps.name: Read current script state
actions: Read topic: GET /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id}&select=script_json,script_pass_scores,script_metadata,project_id
Read prompt_configs: GET /rest/v1/prompt_configs?project_id=eq.{project_id}&is_active=eq.true
Read project for niche profile: GET /rest/v1/projects?id=eq.{project_id}

async_steps.name: Identify weakest pass
actions: Compare script_pass_scores.pass1.score, pass2.score, pass3.score
Select the pass with the lowest score as the regeneration target
If scores are equal, prefer regenerating Pass 1 (foundation affects everything downstream)

async_steps.name: Update status
actions: PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='scripting', script_review_status='refining'
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_refinement', action: 'started', details: { target_pass, instructions } }

async_steps.name: Regenerate weakest pass
actions: Load the prompt template for the target pass (script_pass1, script_pass2, or script_pass3)
Inject standard variables + user instructions as additional refinement context
If regenerating Pass 2: include Pass 1 output as context (same as original generation)
If regenerating Pass 3: include Pass 1 + Pass 2 summaries as context
Call Claude Sonnet via Anthropic API with augmented prompt
Parse response into scenes array

async_steps.name: Re-score regenerated pass
actions: Call evaluator prompt with regenerated pass output
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores.{target_pass} = { score, dimensions, feedback }

async_steps.name: Re-evaluate combined script
actions: Replace the target pass scenes in the full script with regenerated scenes
Call evaluator with full combined script

PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores.combined = { score, dimensions, feedback }, script_quality_score = new_combined_score, script_evaluation = { dimensions, feedback, timestamp }

async_steps.name: Update stored script
actions: Rebuild script_json with updated scenes from regenerated pass
Recalculate word_count and scene_count
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_json=..., word_count=N, scene_count=N
DELETE scenes for this topic that belong to the regenerated pass range: DELETE /rest/v1/scenes?topic_id=eq.{topic_id}&scene_number=gte.{start}&scene_number=lte.{end}
INSERT replacement scene rows for the regenerated pass: POST /rest/v1/scenes
Append to refinement_history: PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET refinement_history = refinement_history || [{ instructions, timestamp, pass_regenerated, old_score, new_score }]

async_steps.name: Finalize
actions: PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='review', script_review_status='pending'
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_refinement', action: 'completed', details: { pass_regenerated, old_score, new_score, instructions } }

error_handling.on_claude_api_error: PATCH topics status='failed', error_log=error_message. Log to production_log.
error_handling.on_supabase_write_error: Retry once. If still fails, PATCH topics status='failed'.
error_handling.on_timeout: 120s timeout per Claude call. On timeout, fail and restore previous status='review'.

notes: Refinement regenerates only ONE pass (the weakest), not the entire script.
User instructions are injected as additional context alongside the original prompt template.
The refinement_history array tracks all refinement attempts for audit trail.
After refinement completes, the script returns to 'review' status for re-evaluation by the user.
